raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Landing check-in","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, Aisha?","description":"Safe opener that lets her set context before any friction is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Week four map","name":"How has week four felt from your side?","description":"Surfaces how she is landing in the role and environment without assuming a problem.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision ownership","name":"What decisions do you feel fully clear you own end to end?","description":"Tests where decision rights are already crisp versus still fuzzy.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Unclear edges","name":"Where does the boundary of your role still feel fuzzy?","description":"Surfaces the parts of scope that are still ambiguous in practice.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Partner expectations","name":"What do partners seem to expect from you when priorities collide?","description":"Checks whether she can read cross-functional expectations or is still guessing.","purpose":"competency","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Alignment pattern","name":"How are you choosing to align people before a decision?","description":"Reveals the current alignment method and whether it is lightweight enough for the work.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Consensus drag","name":"What part of alignment is creating the most extra cycle for you?","description":"Finds where consensus-seeking is slowing execution or adding noise.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"First friction","name":"What is still slowing you down when priorities conflict?","description":"Surfaces the specific friction point that is hardest to move through right now.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support boundary","name":"What would make the escalation boundary clearer for you?","description":"Identifies the manager support that would reduce guesswork and unspoken-norm decoding.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Steadier next steps","name":"What support from me would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes by turning the discussion into concrete support and next-step commitment.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
